settings.heroEyebrow: Tobin Street · Cork City · Open daily 10–4

story.heading: A neighbourhood brunch room with a bit of mischief.
story.paragraph1: Small room. Great plates. Serious coffee. Paperboys is tucked onto Tobin Street — the kind of place you plan to stay an hour and end up in all morning.
story.paragraph2: No fuss. No pretence. Just good food, good people, and our two paperboys keeping watch. When the evening calls — we know how to make it worth your while.
story.storefrontQuote: "Two faces over the door, and the best reason to leave the house before noon."

menu.introText: Served all day. Allergen numbers in brackets — full key at the foot of the list.
menu.allergenKey: Allergens — 1 Gluten · 2 Crustaceans · 3 Eggs · 4 Fish · 5 Peanuts · 6 Soy · 7 Milk · 8 Nuts · 9 Celery · 10 Mustard · 11 Sesame · 12 Sulphites · 13 Lupin · 14 Molluscs.

dishes.name: Halloumi Florentine
dishes.description: Brioche, halloumi, sautéed spinach, balsamic tomato compot, poached eggs. Add avo / crispy bacon.

dishes.name: The Revised Morning Issue
dishes.description: Signature hash browns, black pudding hash, hollandaise, poached eggs. Add crispy bacon / avo.

dishes.name: Benny Boru
dishes.description: Brioche, honey-glazed ham, hollandaise, poached eggs. Add crispy bacon / black pudding.

dishes.name: Avo… Smash!
dishes.description: Sourdough or brioche, smashed avo, crispy chilli & peanut ryu, poached eggs. Add halloumi / crispy bacon.

dishes.name: The Ham 'n 2 Cheeses
dishes.description: Honey-mustard glazed ham, 2-cheese sauce, smoked cheddar & emmentaler. Add fries.

dishes.name: The Muthah Cluckah
dishes.description: Crispy battered buttermilk & hot-sauce marinated chicken, pickles, lettuce, hot ranch sauce. Add fries / crispy bacon.

dishes.name: The Banh Mi
dishes.description: Vietnamese pork belly, pickled daikon & carrot, chilli, coriander, vietnamayo, baguette. Veg sub: crispy garlic chilli tofu.

dishes.name: The Melt
dishes.description: Roast peppers, mushroom, caramelised onion, 2-cheese sauce, smoked cheddar, emmentaler. Add fries.

gallery.caption: On the plate
gallery.alt: Two brunch plates — buttermilk fried chicken with French toast, and grilled halloumi with flatbread

gallery.caption: Coffee, all day
gallery.alt: A flat white with latte art

gallery.caption: Egg tostadas

eventsHero.subtitle: Brunch clubs, supper nights, DJ Sundays, pop-up collabs — Paperboys is more than a café. It's a place things happen.

hire.heading: Got something to celebrate?
hire.paragraph: Paperboys takes private bookings for brunches, evening dinners, work dos, birthdays and everything in between. Full buyout, bespoke menus, up to 40 guests. We sort the food, the coffee and the atmosphere — you bring the people.
hire.details: Up to 40 guests · Full buyout · Bespoke menus · Morning, afternoon or evening

newsletter.subtext: Events, Sunday Sessions, pop-ups — in your inbox before it hits the gram.
